name: 侦探，请守护我的秘密吧！
slug: 侦探请守护我的秘密吧
short_description: Step into Detective Kazuo Kurosawa’s role. Uncover mysteries involving eight enigmatic women. Choose to aid or save them. Features: • Hacker puzzles & QTE chases • Live-action cinematics • Anti-cliché thriller romance • 207-day polished script • Multi-timeline narrative
detailed_description:
Analyzing Network Environment
Black Card Connecting

Locating IP Address…
Target Acquired: [“Detective, Guard My Secret”] Store Page

Intrusion Successful

Holy crap, finally hacked in! Who writes these lame product descriptions? This ain"t some cheesy dating sim, dude!

I"m a freakin" detective! Real mysteries here! These femmes fatales are packing secrets - hence the dang title!

Fine, let me break it down.

So you"ll meet these hot clients (photos below) who hire you for cases:

  • Miss Pure Sunshine: Dance instructor Liu Yuqing (body goals!)

  • Happy-Go-Lucky Gym Rat Streamer Li Chenyu (kinda airheaded)

  • Ice-Cold CEO Fang Yun (trust me, don"t piss her off)

Others on the poster? Play the game to meet "em. Seriously, it"s not all about romance!

Each girl"s got skeletons in her closet. Will you join their downward spiral or drag "em from the abyss? Hero or bastard - your call.

Pfft, I know what you"re thinking. Don"t sleep on mystery-romance! I"m badass detective Kurosawa Kaede - combines Bruce Wayne"s brains with Brad Pitt"s looks. Just trust me!

Oh wait.

You ARE me.

Key Features

  • First-Edition: Hybrid Genre of Rom-Com Detective Cinema Experience
    Who says mystery needs ghosts n" gore? Dive into absurd cases blending deadpan humor with mind-blowing twists. More than dating sim - it"s interactive noir cinema!

  • Branching Narrative System
    · 500+ mins gameplay / 20+ wildly different endings
    · True non-linear “Tree of Choices” - decisions diverge permanently
    · Hack systems / Gather clues / QTEs / Multilayer flirt mechanics
    · Upgrade classic dating sim formula with PI toolkit

  • Cast of 8 Knockout Heroines
    Diverse ladies bring unique professions/quirks/sexy secrets. Office lady? Idol singer? 4 hidden characters await discovery.

  • Morality Meter
    Your “Justice Level” shapes final outcomes. White knight or chaotic neutral? Be the judge (literally).

“Investigate. Discover. Choose. Redeem.”

Dev Diary

“This isn"t about fixing them. It"s about who YOU become.”

First interactive movie from Serenity Studios. Holy hell, blending cinema with game mechanics was brutal.

Original vision? Cool detective persona solving cases while dating hotties. Reality check: We nearly died syncing film shoots with code-heavy branching narratives.

Maybe our gameplay isn"t AAA polish, but damn… we bet everything on gripping twists and complex characters. Three-month delay? Worth it to avoid half-baked crap.

Boss said: “Even virgins deserve to look sexy.” Treat this as Season 1 of our “Detective Cinematic Universe” - ambitious worldbuilding despite rookie stumbles. Your feedback? Brutal honesty welcome.

Because like our tagline says:

“Lies comfort. Truths destroy.”

Find your truth. Find your girls. Find yourself.

[Price tags/Cast crew info] omitted per client request
